introSection: Achterbahn (English: Roller coaster) is a kiddie roller coaster currently located at Tierpark Essehof in Lehre, Lower Saxony, Germany. The coaster is actually unnamed within the park. Giving it the basic name used on Coasterpedia.

sections.content: The car is designed to resemble a soapbox race car.

fullText:
Achterbahn (English: Roller coaster) is a kiddie roller coaster currently located at Tierpark Essehof in Lehre, Lower Saxony, Germany. The coaster is actually unnamed within the park. Giving it the basic name used on Coasterpedia.



Red track and yellow supports.

The car is designed to resemble a soapbox race car.
